data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of providing last-minute discounts to fill empty slots. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate any implementation of such discounts, as it only outlines fixed pricing scenarios without any indication of dynamic pricing adjustments or discounts based on time constraints. This leads to a conclusion of a gap in requirement satisfaction, as the necessary functionality is not evidenced in the current implementation.
gaps: Last-minute discounts to fill empty slots are not evidenced in the current implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
